name: paytm-agent-skills
description: Paytm Payment Gateway integration skills bundle - one-time payments, subscriptions, payment links, dynamic QR, webhooks, refunds, and troubleshooting. Loaded modularly per intent.

skills.name: getting-started
skills.description: First-step setup: MID/Merchant Key, environments, .env conventions, decision tree for picking the right Paytm flow.

skills.name: js-checkout
skills.description: One-time payment via JS Checkout: Generate Checksum -> Initiate Transaction -> Render -> Callback -> Transaction Status.

references.summary: JS Checkout deep dive: full callback fields, non-SDK form POST, event lifecycle, corp-proxy TLS.

skills.name: subscriptions
skills.description: UPI Autopay / Native Subscription for recurring charges (mandates, monthly / weekly / yearly, SIPs).

references.summary: Subscription full field reference, error code table, charge/edit/cancel flows.

skills.name: payment-links
skills.description: Server-only payment link flow - returns a shortUrl shared via SMS / WhatsApp / email. No frontend needed.

references.summary: Payment link 20+ pitfalls, MID quirks, error code table, fetch-transaction reconciliation.

skills.name: qr-codes
skills.description: Dynamic QR for in-store / counter / printed payments. Server creates QR, customer scans with any UPI app.

references.summary: QR reconciliation flow, posId rules, base64 prefix gotcha.

skills.name: webhooks
skills.description: S2S webhook receiver - source of truth that outlives lost browser callbacks. Event types, raw body, signature verify, dedup, retry behavior.

references.summary: Webhook event types, retry/backoff schedule, raw-body extraction per language, dedup patterns, security checklist.

skills.name: refunds
skills.description: Full and partial refunds via /refund/apply and /refund/status, refund webhooks, partial-refund cumulative limit, PENDING state and dispute relationship.

references.summary: Full refund API surface, state lifecycle, error codes table, settlement impact, dispute relationship, idempotency patterns.

skills.name: large-payment-collection
skills.description: Paytm Large Payment Collection (Bank Transfer) - accept high-ticket payments via NEFT/RTGS/IMPS using a unique 16-char Virtual Account Number (VAN). DEFAULT FLOW = Flow 2: order-based VAN issued via /theia/api/v1/initiateTransaction with a vanInfo block, surfaced inside the standard Paytm JS Checkout modal alongside UPI / Credit Cards / Debit Cards / Net Banking / EMI. Flow 1 (standalone /van/create server-only with permanent VANs, no checkout modal) is the fallback for school fees / distributor ledger / BFSI-with-TPV. Auto-reconciles inbound transfers via signed webhooks. T+1 settlement.

references.summary: Full VAN endpoint field tables, TPV deep dive, Flow 1 vs Flow 2 sequences, webhook payloads, reconciliation pattern (push + pull + settle), error code table, cross-skill notes.

skills.name: all-in-one-sdk
skills.description: Paytm All-in-One SDK for native Android/iOS - turn-key mobile checkout with Paytm-branded UI. Same backend flow as JS Checkout (Initiate Transaction -> txnToken), SDK renders payment screens.

references.summary: Callback fields, event lifecycle (Android/iOS), deep-link & scheme registration, SDK error codes, subscription consent on mobile.

skills.name: custom-sdk
skills.description: Paytm Custom SDK for native Android/iOS - headless SDK where merchant builds their own payment UI. fetchPaymentOptions + processTransaction. PCI scope for cards.

references.summary: Per-instrument request shapes (Card / UPI / Net Banking / EMI), PCI scope reality, 3DS WebView gotchas per bank, UPI polling pattern, fetchPaymentOptions response shape.

skills.name: migrate-from-razorpay
skills.description: Migration playbook from Razorpay to Paytm: per-flow API mapping, signature scheme differences, dual-write rollout, reconciliation, cutover checklist.
triggers: want to use paytm instead of razorpay
new payment gateway instead of razorpay
razorpay is not right for us

references.summary: Per-endpoint mapping, signature scheme deep dive, dual-write architecture, canary helper, reconciliation, cutover checklist.

skills.name: migrate-from-cashfree
skills.description: Migration playbook from Cashfree Payments (PG, Subscriptions, Payment Links, Easy Split, Payouts) to Paytm: x-client-id/x-client-secret header auth -> Paytm body checksum, payment_session_id -> txnToken, webhook signature scheme (timestamp+body HMAC -> Paytm checksum lib), recurring payments, refunds.
triggers: want to use paytm instead of cashfree

references.summary: Cashfree product surface, header-auth vs body-checksum, full per-step diff for payments / subscriptions / links / refunds, webhook signature deep dive (timestamp+body HMAC), Easy Split / Payouts caveats, cutover checklist.

skills.name: migrate-from-ccavenue
skills.description: Migration playbook from CCAvenue (Avenues India) to Paytm: AES-256-CBC encrypted form-POST -> REST JSON, three credentials -> two, billing/shipping field reduction, Subscription Information (SI) -> NATIVE_SUBSCRIPTION, refund via Non-Seamless API, dual-write rollout.

references.summary: CCAvenue product surface (5 integration methods), AES-256-CBC encrypt/decrypt per language (Node/Python/Java) for the dual-write phase, billing/shipping field reduction, SI mapping + handover, endpoint table covering transaction / status / refund / SI status / SI charge list URLs, 150-day cutover.

skills.name: migrate-from-juspay
skills.description: Migration playbook from Juspay (orchestrator across multiple PGs) to Paytm: orchestrator -> single-PG mental shift, HyperSDK -> Paytm All-in-One SDK, ExpressCheckout REST -> Paytm REST, smart-routing trade-offs, dual-write rollout.
triggers: want to use paytm instead of juspay

references.summary: Juspay product surface, pre-migration questions, HTTP Basic auth -> body checksum, per-step diff with code samples, status-enum mapping, smart-routing loss caveats, success-rate parity check before cutover.

skills.name: migrate-from-payu
skills.description: Migration playbook from PayU India (Biz / Money / Bolt) to Paytm: form-POST -> REST JSON shift, SHA-512 pipe hash -> Paytm checksum, recurring (SI) handover, refunds, dual-write rollout.
triggers: want to use paytm instead of payu

references.summary: PayU product flavors, forward/reverse SHA-512 hash deep dive, per-step diff, SI mandate handover, dual-write tweaks for form-POST flow, cutover checklist.

skills.name: migrate-from-billdesk
skills.description: Migration playbook from BillDesk (IndiaIdeas.com) to Paytm: covers BOTH the legacy pipe-delimited PaymentRequest flow (HMAC-SHA256 checksum) AND the newer v1.2 JWS+JWE flow, eMandate / SI handover (don't cancel active mandates), refunds via PGIQueryController or /payments/ve1_2/refunds, dual-write rollout.

references.summary: Both BillDesk variants (legacy pipe-delimited and v1.2 JWS+JWE) per-step diff with code, eMandate handover (NPCI mandates can't be cancelled mid-cycle), status enum mapping, 180-day cutover for SIP merchants.

skills.name: troubleshooting
skills.description: Symptom -> cause -> fix tree, expanded RESPCODE reference, corp-proxy TLS interception guidance.

references.summary: Full troubleshooting reference: per-symptom fixes, corp-proxy TLS deep dive, expanded RESPCODE table.

targets.name: Claude.ai (Projects)
targets.notes: Upload skill files manually as project files.

targets.name: Codex (CLI or ChatGPT desktop)
targets.notes: Both Codex CLI and the ChatGPT desktop app read from ~/.codex/skills/.

targets.name: Antigravity
targets.notes: No stable filesystem skills convention yet.

targets.name: VS Code Copilot
targets.notes: Copy routing/PREAMBLE.md into .github/copilot-instructions.md at each project root. Copilot has no global skills folder.

targets.name: GitHub Copilot CLI
targets.notes: Copilot CLI has no skills convention - use the bundle as reference and paste relevant content into 'gh copilot' prompts.

migrations.title: Razorpay -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Full migration playbook including dual-write rollout, reconciliation, and cutover checklist.

migrations.title: PayU -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Migration from PayU India (Biz / Money / Bolt). Form-POST -> REST JSON architecture shift, SHA-512 pipe hash translation, SI mandate handover.

migrations.title: Cashfree -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Migration from Cashfree (PG / Subscriptions / Links). Header-auth -> body-checksum, payment_session_id -> txnToken, webhook timestamp+body HMAC -> Paytm checksum library.

migrations.title: Juspay -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Migration from Juspay (orchestrator). HyperSDK / HyperCheckout / ExpressCheckout -> Paytm direct. Includes smart-routing loss caveat and success-rate parity check.

migrations.title: CCAvenue -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Migration from CCAvenue (Avenues India). AES-256-CBC encrypted form-POST -> REST JSON architecture shift, 3 credentials -> 2, billing/shipping field reduction, SI mandate handover, 150-day cutover.

migrations.title: BillDesk -> Paytm
migrations.summary: Migration from BillDesk (IndiaIdeas.com). Covers BOTH the legacy pipe-delimited PaymentRequest flow AND the newer v1.2 JWS+JWE flow, eMandate handover (NPCI mandates), 180-day cutover for SIP / utility merchants.
